case_title: THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC VS. SARA TASHAKORINIA ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC DBA THE PARAMOUNT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 680 MISSION STREET, APARTMENT #24P, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94105, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC DBA THE PARAMOUNT SERVED SEP-18-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA
DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC DBA THE PARAMOUNT
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE [$139.83 PER DAY] FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC DBA THE PARAMOUNT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC DBA THE PARAMOUNT AS TO DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THIRD & MISSION ASSOCIATES LLC DBA THE PARAMOUNT AS TO DEFENDANT TASHAKORINIA, SARA
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5 INCLUSIVE
